notes: Pairs illuminate outside to center, meeting in middle, then flash at 7400 rpm; pit limiter: yellow light beside indicator #6 flashes, right dash shows "Pit Speed" (1st gear only); source: iRacing Global Mazda MX-5 Cup user manual — confirmed outside_center
Pairs illuminate outside to center; all turn blue at shift point; 6 white flashing pit limiter lights

8 LEDs outside→inside pairs, all flash red at shift (~7500 rpm); pit limiter repurposes shift LEDs as speed indicator: blue=below limit, green=at limit, red=over limit; yellow LED flashes upper-right; lockup: inner-2 red=rear, outer-2 white=minor front, outer-2 blue=severe front; source: iRacing Gen3 Supercars user manual
Outside-in pairs, green outside → darker toward center; all change to blue at shift; flash blue at optimum shift point; source: iRacing Porsche 963 GTP user manual — blue flash confirmed

Outside→center: 2G@6450, 4G@6600, 2Y@6750, 4Y@6900, all-flash@7050 (3rd gear). v2 manual: 'The shift lights illuminate from the outer edges inwardly.' Flash color unspecified; using yellow (last active color). Pit limiter: screen-only PSL indicator — no shift light LED flash during pit limiter. 'A red banner will appear at the bottom of the display along with illumination of the PSL light on the left side of the dashboard.'
All 9 LEDs illuminate blue simultaneously as shift approach; flash red at overrev; unique two-state pattern (off → all blue → flash red)
All LEDs illuminate blue simultaneously at shift point; characteristic all_at_once pattern
All LEDs illuminate blue simultaneously at shift point; characteristic all_at_once pattern
3 red LEDs only: 6000 rpm / 6200 rpm / 6400 rpm; mapped to center LEDs 4-5-6; upshift at third (6400 rpm); source: iRacing Formula Vee user manual

7 active LEDs mapped to 9: 4 Green (6300/6500/6600/6700) + 2 Red (6800/6900) + All Flash at 7000; pit limiter: large green box at base of dash display; source: iRacing FIA F4 user manual — complete RPM table
11 LEDs mapped to 9: 2 Green (4800/5000) + 5 Yellow (5200-6200) + 2 Orange (6400/6600) + all Red flash at 6800; pit limiter = magenta flash; source: iRacing BMW M4 GT3 user manual

10 LEDs on real car mapped to 9; green→yellow→red L→R then all turn blue and flash near 12,000 RPM redline; push-to-pass: inner status LEDs go green; pit: all shift lights flash blue, yellow display border
L→R sequential green→yellow→red; upshift when cluster fully illuminated (~8500 rpm); no explicit shift light table in manual — using default pattern; source: iRacing Ferrari 296 GT3 user manual
L→R sequential; all red flash at shift point; all blue if pushed past redline into overrev zone
10 LEDs on real car mapped to 9; all turn red at shift point; L→R sequential fill
L→R sequential fill; all flash red at ~7025 RPM shift point
Digital tachometer display; final red LED (9) at ~7100 RPM = optimal shift; all flash at ~7200 RPM = overrev warning
10 LEDs on real car mapped to 9; all illuminated = upshift recommended
All flash blue at shift; per-gear shift points: 7900 (1st) to 9000 (6th); iRacing updates DriverCarSLShiftRPM per gear automatically
All flash blue at shift; 8750 rpm limit; same cluster as 992.1 and 992 GT3 R family; source: iRacing Porsche 911 GT3 Cup (992.2) user manual — blue flash family

Shift light cluster over digital display; all LEDs turn blue at shift point; upshift when fully illuminated and all blue; flash blue; source: iRacing Porsche 911 GT3 R (992) user manual — blue flash confirmed
Sequential L→R fill; all turn blue at ~8000 RPM shift point
Sequential L→R fill; all illuminated at 7500 RPM = shift point; side LEDs: yellow = front lockup pair, purple = rear wheelspin pair

car_id: audi r8 lms evo ii gt3
notes: 10 LEDs on real car mapped to 9 Fanatec; upshift when final red LED in sequence lit; pit limiter confirmed from v2 manual: 'six of the shift lights will illuminate in blue, a green overlay box with the vehicle's speed will appear if the car is below the pit speed limit, a red background indicates the vehicle's speed is over the pit speed limit.' Shift light RPM sequence not documented in manual pages 1–12.

Green → red L→R; all change to red and begin flashing at shift point. v2 manual: 'Once the optimum shift point has been reached all LEDs will change to red and begin flashing.' 'lights will illuminate from the left to right starting with green and ending with two red LEDs on the right.' Pit limiter: shift lights + status clusters change to pink, 'SPEED' indicator appears; lights converge toward center as speed approaches pit road limit. 8 shift LEDs on steering wheel plus separate wheelspin/lockup clusters on sides.

Green → red L→R; all change to red and begin flashing at shift point. v2 manual: 'Once the optimum shift point has been reached all LEDs will change to red and begin flashing.' 'lights will illuminate from the left to right starting with green and ending with two red LEDs on the right.' Pit limiter: screen-only magenta box ('magenta box next to the gear indicator with PSL displayed') — no shift light LED flash during pit limiter. Note: unlike Porsche 963/Cadillac GTP (blue flash), BMW M Hybrid flashes red.

Green (left) → red (right) L→R; at shift point all LEDs change to blue and begin flashing; pit limiter = blue flash. v2 manual: 'Once the optimum shift point has been reached all LEDs will change to blue and begin flashing.' Pit: 'shift lights and the screen's background will change to blue, with the shift lights flashing while the system is active.' Green→red progression ends with two red LEDs on right before blue flash.
10 LEDs; green to red L→R; drivers upshift when all lights are red and flashing; pit limiter: all shift lights turn green, yellow PIT LIMITER banner on display

Outside→center: 2G@5790, 4G@5950, 2Y@6110, 4Y@6270, 2R@6430, all-red-flash@6600 (3rd gear; varies by gear). v2 manual: 'The shift lights illuminate from the outer edges inwardly.' Flash: 'all the shift lights flash red, this is at approximately 6600 rpm.' Pit limiter: 'shift light cluster will flash with alternating blue and yellow lights.' LED 5 center mapped to red stage as approximation.

Outside→center: 2G@6000, 2Y@6300, 4Y@6600, 2R@6900 (3rd gear); flash red above 6800–7300 rpm (gear-dependent). v2 manual: 'The shift lights illuminate from the outer edges inwardly.' Pit limiter: 2 centermost LEDs illuminate blue. LED 5 center mapped to red stage as approximation of the 9th position.
8 LEDs numbered individually (4 left + 4 right of display); all fully illuminated = upshift; pit limiter: LED 1 + LED 5 slow blink red; source: iRacing Audi RS 3 LMS TCR user manual
No dedicated shift light section in iRacing manual — using default pattern; 7000 rpm limit; tachometer displayed as curved bar on dash
Upshift when shift lights fully illuminated in red; green→yellow→red L→R progression (direction not explicit in manual but standard BMW GT4); source: iRacing BMW M4 GT4 G82 user manual

Left→right; flash blue at shift point (~6750 rpm); red only past rev limiter. v4 manual: 'The shift lights illuminate from the left to right, indicating the driver should upshift when all are flashing blue. Once the RPM has passed the optimum shift point and is approaching the rev limiter, all lights will begin flashing red.' Pit limiter: 'all shift lights will begin to flash in green.' TC active: all flash green.

Exact shift RPM not documented in manual pages 1–12; using default green→yellow→red L→R. Pit limiter confirmed from v2 manual: 'shift lights flashing in green and the side-mounted LEDs illuminating in a color based on the vehicle speed.' Speed indicator: orange=over limit, green=at limit, white=under limit.

Electric car (single-speed); no shifting required during normal driving; these LEDs are not shift indicators — ABS lockup LEDs on sides of rear-view display; source: iRacing Porsche Mission R user manual
No dedicated shift light section in iRacing manual — using default pattern; 7000 rpm limit; same TCR specification as Veloster N
No dedicated shift light section in iRacing manual — using default pattern; 7000 rpm limit; same TCR specification as Elantra N
Shift light pattern not documented in manual — using default
Bosch DDU S2 dash; shift lights above display; upshift ~7000 rpm (just before rev-limit); pit limiter: all LEDs flash magenta + PSL box on dashboard; source: iRacing BMW M8 GTE user manual
No dedicated shift light cluster in iRacing manual — using default pattern; dash shows wheel lockup and TC activation lights but no RPM-based shift LEDs
Shift lights are acceleration-rate based (not fixed RPM threshold); optimum ~6600 rpm; iRacing SL values still drive the bar correctly; source: iRacing Ligier JS P320 user manual

Upshift ~19200 rpm (limit 20000); v2 manual pit limiter: 'screen turn blue and the lights on the side will flash' — side indicator lights, not the shift LED strip. Shift light color sequence not found in manual pages 1–12; using default pattern. Wheel lock indicator lights on left/right of display are separate from shift LEDs.
Upshift at ~9300 rpm; all fully illuminated = shift point; no dedicated shift light color sequence in manual — using default; source: iRacing Super Formula SF23 user manual
Upshift at ~7000 rpm; all fully illuminated = shift point; no dedicated shift light color sequence in manual — using default; source: iRacing Super Formula Lights user manual
5 LEDs left to right (AIM MXm dash above display); upshift when all 5 lit; mapped to Fanatec positions 3-7; RPM limit 12165; source: iRacing FIA Cross Car user manual
